title: Module 1
content:
Introduction: Relevance of technical drawing in engineering field. Types of
lines, Dimensioning, BIS code of practice for technical drawing. (No
questions for the end semester examination)
Projection of points in different quadrants, Projection of straight lines
inclined to one plane and inclined to both planes. Trace of a line. Inclination
of lines with reference planes. True length and true
inclinations of line inclined to both the reference planes.
9
B.Tech 2024 –S1/S2
APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University

title: Module 2
content:
Projection of Simple solids such as Triangular, Rectangle, Square,
Pentagonal and Hexagonal Prisms, Pyramids, Cone and Cylinder only.
Projection of solids in simple position including profile view. Projection of
solids with axis inclined to one of the reference planes and with axis
inclined to both reference planes.

title: Module 3
content:
Sections of Solids: Sections of Prisms, Pyramids, Cone and Cylinder only,
with axis in vertical position and cut by different section planes. True shape
of the sections. (Exclude true shape given problems)
Development of Surfaces: Development of surfaces of the solids and solids
cut by different section planes. (Exclude problems with through holes)

title: Module 4
content:
Isometric Projection: Isometric scale- Isometric View and Projections of
Prisms, Pyramids, Cone, Cylinder, Sphere, Hemisphere and their
combinations.
Computer Aided Drawing (CAD): Introduction, Role of CAD in design
and development of new products, Advantages of CAD. Creating two-
dimensional drawing with dimensions using suitable software. (CAD, only
internal evaluation)
